sub_evocation.name: School of Evocation
sub_evocation.description: You focus your study on magic that creates powerful elemental effects.

sub_enchantment.name: School of Enchantment
sub_enchantment.description: Your magic focuses on influencing the minds of others.

feat_arc_spellcasting.name: Arcanist's Spellcasting
feat_arc_spellcasting.description: As a student of arcane magic, you have a spellbook containing spells. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability.

feat_arc_recovery.name: Arcane Recovery
feat_arc_recovery.description: Recover spell slots on a Short Rest equal to half your Arcanist level (rounded up).

feat_arc_scripture.name: Arcane Scripture
feat_arc_scripture.description: Expertise in Arcanian and one chosen skill.

feat_arc_spell_mastery.name: Spell Mastery
feat_arc_spell_mastery.description: Cast a 1st and 2nd level spell without slots.

feat_arc_signature.name: Signature Spells
feat_arc_signature.description: Two 3rd level spells are always prepared.

feat_arc_evo_sculpt.name: Sculpt Spells
feat_arc_evo_sculpt.description: Protect allies from your evocation spells.
